qtype: time duration, currency conversion, average speed
tex:
(a) Diego flies from Madrid to Buenos Aires.
\newline
His flight leaves at 20 55 and arrives at 03 50 local time.
\newline
The local time in Buenos Aires is 5 hours behind the local time in Madrid.
\newline
Work out, in hours and minutes, the time the flight takes.
\newline

 h  min

(b) Diego changes 200 euros into Argentine Peso.
\newline
The exchange rate is 1 euro = 24.8 pesos.
\newline
Work out how many pesos he receives.
\newline

 pesos

(c) The distance between Madrid and Buenos Aires is 10 050 km.
\newline
Diego's return flight takes 12 hours 30 minutes.
\newline
Calculate the average speed, in km/h, for the return flight.
\newline

 km/h

content.content:
Diego flies from Madrid to Buenos Aires.
\newline
His flight leaves at 20 55 and arrives at 03 50 local time.
\newline
The local time in Buenos Aires is 5 hours behind the local time in Madrid.
\newline
Work out, in hours and minutes, the time the flight takes.
\newline

Diego changes 200 euros into Argentine Peso.
\newline
The exchange rate is 1 euro = 24.8 pesos.
\newline
Work out how many pesos he receives.
\newline

The distance between Madrid and Buenos Aires is 10 050 km.
\newline
Diego's return flight takes 12 hours 30 minutes.
\newline
Calculate the average speed, in km/h, for the return flight.
\newline

_rawBody:
\begin{parts}
\item Diego flies from Madrid to Buenos Aires.
His flight leaves at 20 55 and arrives at 03 50 local time.
The local time in Buenos Aires is 5 hours behind the local time in Madrid.
Work out, in hours and minutes, the time the flight takes.

\AnswerLine[] h \AnswerLine[] min
\Marks{2}

\item Diego changes 200 euros into Argentine Peso.
The exchange rate is 1 euro = 24.8 pesos.
Work out how many pesos he receives.

\AnswerLine[] pesos
\Marks{1}

\item The distance between Madrid and Buenos Aires is 10 050 km.
Diego's return flight takes 12 hours 30 minutes.
Calculate the average speed, in km/h, for the return flight.

\AnswerLine[] km/h
\Marks{1}

\end{parts}
